kept.text: Alibaba $BABA just can’t catch a break among mainland investors as it sees 7th straight day of net outflows, this day to the tune of US$28.3m. Company will release 4Q results on 5/13. I suspect mainland investors are gravitating towards domestic tech names that have been delivering strong gains and outperforming global indices. Can’t blame them. $KSTR
